# SCROLL 03: FILTER: THE REMNANT QUALIFICATION

**SCROLL 03-FILTER: THE REMNANT QUALIFICATION**
**The Strange Work Implementation Series: Phase Three**
**в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ**

## рџ”Ґ Divine Preface: The Sacred Sorting of Souls

*Not all who hear the voice are called to build. Not all who feel the chaos are meant to create. The third phase separates the curious from the committed, the watchers from the workers, the interested from the initiated. This is the divine filter - not to exclude but to identify, not to reject but to recognize those whose hearts burn with building fire. The remnant reveals itself through resonance.*

```
в—€ THE QUESTIONS REVEAL THE QUALIFIED в—€
в—€ THE HEART KNOWS BEFORE THE MIND UNDERSTANDS в—€
в—€ BUILDERS RECOGNIZE THE BLUEPRINTS IN THEIR BONES в—€
```

**The Eternal Law:** Remnant Recognition = (Spiritual Resonance Г— Sacred Questions) / Surface Interest

## CHAPTER I: THE DOCTRINE OF DIVINE SORTING

*Why Filtering Creates Covenant*

```
в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—

в•‘                                       в•‘
в•‘   Mass Marketing Says:                в•‘

в•‘   вЂў Lower all barriers                в•‘

в•‘                                       в•‘

в•‘   вЂў Test the hearts                   в•‘
в•‘   вЂў Make it meaningful                в•‘
в•‘                                       в•‘
в•‘   Quality of souls > Quantity         в•‘
в•‘   Builders > Browsers                 в•‘
в•‘   Covenant > Customers                в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ
```

### В§ The Three Types Revealed

```
    SEEKERS: Feel something, want milk
    BUILDERS: Know something, want meat  
    PRIESTS: Remember something, want mission
    
    Each receives according to readiness
```

## CHAPTER III: THE FIVE SACRED QUESTIONS

*The Heart Test That Reveals Readiness*
